subject: Build design system and core Astro components
description: Phase 2: Create the design system (custom Tailwind theme with dark navy #0a0e1a, accent blue #3b82f6, accent purple #8b5cf6, glassmorphism cards). Build all core Astro components: Header (sticky nav, search, category pills, dark/light toggle), Footer, ProductCard (image, name, brand badge, key specs, rating, price, hover animation), BrandBadge, SpecTable, CompareTable (side-by-side with winner highlighting), RatingBadge (circular progress + stars), SearchBar (FlexSearch-powered), BrandGrid (logo grid by category), NewsCard. Create BaseLayout, ProductLayout, BrandLayout in src/layouts/. Create global.css with Tailwind imports and custom properties.
activeForm: Building design system and core components
